item.title: IDS, Prophesee Deepen Collaboration to Advance Next-Generation Event-Based Industrial Vision Systems
item.description: IDS and Prophesee expand their partnership to develop next-generation event-based industrial vision cameras.

item.title: Automated Inspection and Packaging of 36,000 Syringes per Hour
item.description: New automated turnkey system enables immediate identification and replacement of defective syringes without disrupting workflow.

item.title: Camera Sets New Standard in High-Speed Industrial 3D Scanning
item.description: AT Sensors introduced a new C7 triangulation camera to improve high-speed industrial 3D measurement operations.

item.title: Physik Instrumente Expands Portfolio of Piezo Flexure Stages for Ultra-Precise Motion Control
item.description: Physik Instrumente offers an extensive portfolio of piezo flexure stages designed to deliver ultra-precise positioning in machine vision control technologies.

item.title: Loop Technology Expands Automation Solutions to North America
item.description: UK Based Loop Technology recently announced the launch of Loop Technology US Inc., marking a significant step in the company’s international expansion.

item.title: Datalogic Unveils World’s First Single-Reader Solution for 1-Metre Conveyor Scanning
item.description: Datalogic has introduced the Matrix 830 and 930 series, the only 2D area imagers in the world that can scan conveyor belts up to 1 meter wide with a single device.

item.title: Teledyne e2v’s Perciva 5D Targets Next-Generation Robotics and Smart Factory Vision Systems
item.description: Teledyne e2v launches the Perciva 5D camera, designed to make high-quality short-range 3D vision cost-effective, reliable, and easy to integrate.
